**Describe the camera**
Which camera / RAW format would you like to be supported?

**RAW samples**
Upload your RAW sample files to [rawdb.dnglab.org](https://rawdb.dnglab.org).

**RAW samples contribution checklist**
- [ ] I've read the [contribution guidelines](https://github.com/dnglab/dnglab/blob/main/-CONTRIBUTE_SAMPLES.md)
- [ ] I'm the creator of the provided samples and contributing them under the CC-0 license
- [ ] Filenames are self-explanatory, e.g. *MODEL_ISOXXX_RAWQUALITY.EXT* (not IMG_0123.RAW)
- [ ] The sample set is complete (all RAW modes, e.g. lossless, lossy, uncompressed, medium, small, etc., are included)
